name: pump_fade_base_meme
description: pump_fade BASE mode revival on meme/micro-cap alts. Baseline pf_v4c_240d showed edge came from MYXUSDT/RIVERUSDT/AZTECUSDT/ENSOUSDT (not BTC/ETH/DOGE). Baseline used 120m pump window, base mode (no vX_enable).
_diagnosis: v4r autoresearch (243 combos) found 0 passing combos — v4 exhaustion wick is too rare on liquid alts in this period.
Root cause: baseline trades show 'pump X%/120m then reversal' = BASE mode, not v4.
Baseline edge symbols: MYXUSDT (5 trades), AZTECUSDT (5 trades), ENSOUSDT (4 trades), RIVERUSDT (3 trades).
These are thin micro-cap/meme coins that pump hard and revert predictably.
Correct approach: BASE mode, 120m window, meme coin universe.
PF_PUMP_THRESHOLD_PCT=0.08 default fires when price hits +8% at any point in the window,
then stays flagged until reversal conditions met — so reported pump% at entry can be lower (2-5%).
CRITICAL FIX (v2): Baseline commit e341055e had 190-line pump_fade.py — NO exhaustion filter,
NO rsi_override, NO confirm_bars, single-bar reversal (c < ema AND c < prev_close).
PF_USE_EXHAUSTION_FILTER=1 was blocking ALL trades in initial run. Fixed to 0.
PF_CONFIRM_BARS set to 1, PF_REVERSAL_BODY_MIN_FRAC set to 0 to match baseline logic.
Diagnostic: 5 symbols + exhaustion_off + RSI=75 → 15 trades PF=1.22 (vs baseline 19 PF=1.88).
10-symbol universe expected to yield ~25-35 trades in best combos.
